title: DESNZ: ministerial overseas travel and meetings, January to March 2025
body: " Update: 10 November 2025  The date of Philip Hunt’s meeting with the Ellison Institute of Technology to discuss small Modular reactors and data centres has been amended from 17 March 2025 to 24 March 2025, this was due to an administrative error.   The Department for Energy Security and Net Zero (DESNZ) publishes details of ministers’ meetings with external organisations and overseas travel on a quarterly basis.  This data is also available on data.gov.uk:   Ministerial travel and meetings with external organisations   "
